metadata.title: Opener: New Tab by Default
metadata.description: Opener: New Tab by Default Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: log
ast.source: Opener-Plugin: Strange floating object found (no window)
ast.target: Opener-插件：发现异常浮动对象（无窗口）

ast.name: log
ast.source: Opener-Plugin: Strange floating object found (no tabs)
ast.target: Opener-插件：发现异常浮动对象（无标签页）

ast.name: log
ast.source: Opener-Plugin: Strange floating object found (no leaf)
ast.target: Opener-插件：发现异常浮动对象（无叶子节点）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable to open new files in a new tab (or existing tab, if it was previously opened). Disable for default Obsidian behavior.
ast.target: 启用后，新文件将在新标签页中打开（如果之前已打开过，则在现有标签页中打开）。禁用则使用 Obsidian 的默认行为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This shouldn't be necessary, but you can manually enable custom extensions here.
ast.target: 通常无需此操作，但您可以在此处手动启用自定义扩展名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter extension names (without the dot, ie, just docx separated by newlines).
ast.target: 输入扩展名（不带点号，例如仅输入 docx，每行一个）。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: New tab by default
ast.target: 默认在新标签页打开

ast.name: setName
ast.source: PDF default app
ast.target: PDF 默认应用程序

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Default app only when Ctrl/Cmd key is held
ast.target: 仅在按住 Ctrl/Cmd 键时使用默认应用程序

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Open everything outside of Obsidian
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 外部打开所有内容

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Open outside Obsidian: manual list
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 外部打开：手动列表

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Manual list
ast.target: 手动列表

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Open in same tab
ast.target: 在同一标签页中打开

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Next file will open in same tab
ast.target: 下一个文件将在同一标签页中打开

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Opener: New tab for all files enabled
ast.target: Opener：已为所有文件启用新标签页

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Opener: New tab for all files disabled
ast.target: Opener：已为所有文件禁用新标签页

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Opener: Open all PDFs with default app enabled
ast.target: Opener：已启用使用默认应用程序打开所有 PDF

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Opener: Open all PDFs with default app disabled
ast.target: Opener：已禁用使用默认应用程序打开所有 PDF

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Opening external file with default app (Opener Plugin)
ast.target: 正在使用默认应用程序打开外部文件（Opener 插件）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Opener Tip: Hold Cmd/Ctrl key to open with default app
ast.target: Opener 提示：按住 Cmd/Ctrl 键可使用默认应用程序打开

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Opener: This is a Linked Tab! Opening in same tab therefore.
ast.target: Opener：这是一个链接标签页！因此将在同一标签页中打开。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Open next file in same tab (Obsidian default behavior)
ast.target: 在同一标签页中打开下一个文件（Obsidian 默认行为）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Enable new tab for all files
ast.target: 为所有文件启用新标签页

ast.name: name
ast.source: Disable new tab for all files
ast.target: 为所有文件禁用新标签页

ast.name: name
ast.source: Enable open all PDFs with default app
ast.target: 启用使用默认应用程序打开所有 PDF

ast.name: name
ast.source: Disable open all PDFs with default app
ast.target: 禁用使用默认应用程序打开所有 PDF

ast.name: name
ast.source: Open Graph View in new tab
ast.target: 在新标签页中打开图形视图
